message:
test(fairness): verify boosted 2L+1 cancel-streak bound under drain modes (bd-3dv80)

Add tests proving that the scheduler respects the boosted cancel-streak
fairness bound when the Lyapunov governor suggests DrainObligations or
DrainRegions. Under these modes the effective cancel_streak_limit doubles
to 2*L, giving a 2L+1 ready/timed starvation bound.

three_lane.rs:
- Add set_cached_suggestion() test-only method on ThreeLaneWorker to
  force the governor's scheduling suggestion for deterministic dispatch
  verification

cancel_lane_fairness_bounds.rs:
- Add verify_boosted_bound_for_limit() parametric helper that floods
  the cancel lane with 8x the boosted limit, injects one ready task,
  forces a drain suggestion, and asserts the ready task appears within
  the 2L+1 bound (0-indexed position <= 2L)
- Also asserts the boost is active: under drain mode, the ready task
  should appear at position >= L (not at the normal L bound)
- 7 test cases covering DrainObligations at limits 1/2/4/8/16 and
  DrainRegions at limits 4/16

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
